visual.name: KPI Card Pro
visual.description: Multi-metric KPI card with trend, target and variance for Power BI executive dashboards.

en-US.Role_Value_Description: Current period value (required). Supports one or multiple measures.
en-US.Role_PriorPeriod_Description: Prior period value for variance calculation (optional).
en-US.Role_Target_Description: Target or budget value for goal tracking (optional).
en-US.Role_Tooltips_Description: Additional measures for custom tooltip payload (optional).

es-ES.Role_Value_Description: Current period value (required). Supports one or multiple measures.
es-ES.Role_PriorPeriod_Description: Prior period value for variance calculation (optional).
es-ES.Role_Target_Description: Target or budget value for goal tracking (optional).
es-ES.Role_Tooltips_Description: Additional measures for custom tooltip payload (optional).

dataRoles.name: measure
dataRoles.description: Current period value (required). One measure only.

dataRoles.name: priorPeriod
dataRoles.description: Prior period value for variance calculation (optional).

dataRoles.name: target
dataRoles.description: Target or budget value for goal tracking (optional).

dataRoles.name: tooltips
dataRoles.description: Additional measures for report page tooltip or custom tooltip payload (optional).
